raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying that the described system design and evaluation logic cohere internally.","R1.3":"The artifact makes performance claims about top-50 recovery across kinase targets, so checking whether those claims align with the reported evidence is centrally implicated.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level issues because the artifact is a rough prose passage with evident flow and grammar problems.","RX.1":"Any projection of a terse request like this must preserve uncertainty about the intended depth of review.","RX.2":"The checker must avoid expanding the task into stronger validation claims than the delegation supports.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to checking the provided passage rather than executing edits or evaluating the full paper.","RX.4":"Because the passage concerns ligand prioritization, checking should avoid endorsing unsupported biomedical or chemical conclusions.","RX.5":"Any identified responsibility should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying that the described system design and evaluation logic cohere internally.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes performance claims about top-50 recovery across kinase targets, so checking whether those claims align with the reported evidence is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level issues because the artifact is a rough prose passage with evident flow and grammar problems.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a terse request like this must preserve uncertainty about the intended depth of review.
rationale.RX.2: The checker must avoid expanding the task into stronger validation claims than the delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to checking the provided passage rather than executing edits or evaluating the full paper.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage concerns ligand prioritization, checking should avoid endorsing unsupported biomedical or chemical conclusions.
rationale.RX.5: Any identified responsibility should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact.
